description_long: This chaise features a modern, sculptural design with a continuous, undulating profile that supports the body in a reclined position. The exterior is clad in segmented, wood-like slats that follow the flowing curves of the seat and backrest, creating a visually dynamic surface. The base is solid and angular, contrasting with the organic wave of the upper surface, and is finished in a smooth, neutral gray material. The chaise lacks visible legs, armrests, or separate cushions, emphasizing its monolithic and minimalist construction. The top surface is wide and ergonomically contoured, inviting users to lounge comfortably. The overall appearance is contemporary and well-suited for urban parks, plazas, or public relaxation areas.
description: A modern, wave-shaped chaise with segmented wood-like slats and a solid, angular gray base. Its sculptural, ergonomic form is designed for comfortable lounging in urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full undulating profile and segmented slat surface, highlighting the ergonomic wave and the solid gray base.
description_view_1: End view displaying the width and the diagonal pattern of the slats, with the solid block-like structure visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the wave profile, emphasizing the continuous curve and the segmented construction.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the broad, flat lounging surface and the linear arrangement of the slats.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is integrated into the continuous wave form of the chaise, rising smoothly from the seat in a high, gently curving arc. It is segmented by horizontal slats and lacks any decorative elements or cutouts.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The chaise does not have visible legs; instead, it rests on a solid, block-like base that extends the full length and width of the object.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The surface is not upholstered but is covered in evenly spaced, horizontal wood-like slats, creating a linear, segmented texture.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no visible cushions; the seating and backrest surfaces are formed by the continuous, contoured slatted structure.
